news.headline: Bitcoin hits potential peak as 828K BTC sold by long-term holders in a month. Analyst warns of imminent market volatility.
news.summary: According to a cryptocurrency expert, Bitcoin is currently experiencing a scenario akin to a game of "musical chairs," signaling a volatile and uncertain market situation. The analyst urges traders to remain vigilant and ready for potential downturns, emphasizing the importance of being prepared for sudden shifts in the market dynamics.

news.headline: Bitcoin's value may surpass $150,000 by January, says DeFi Derivatives Platform Derive, with a chance for rise in assets.
news.summary: There is a slight possibility in the derivatives market for Bitcoin and Ethereum that the digital assets may experience a surge to new peaks by January.

news.headline: British labor market data under scrutiny as officials struggle with incomplete information, leaving economists uncertain.
news.summary: Authorities are facing challenges in accurately assessing the state of the UK labor market as the national statistics agency works towards enhancing the quality of data reporting.

news.headline: BP's chairman advised to sell the company, according to a report by Bloomberg.
LG released open-source generative AI, EXAONE 3.5 after EXAONE 3.0. ChatEXAONE, an AI agent service, will be launched.
news.summary: After the successful release of EXAONE 3.0 in August, the latest version, EXAONE 3.5, was made available as open source on the 9th of this month. This move aims to promote an open AI research environment and is anticipated to hasten innovation. Additionally, the official launch of ChatEXAONE, an enterprise AI agent service, has commenced, integrating AI into various operations.

news.headline: AnX Robotica secures agreement with Premier, Inc. for Gastrointestinal Endoscopy Products, effective from February 1st, 2025.
news.summary: A company based in Plano, Texas, AnX Robotica, has secured a national group purchasing deal for Gastrointestinal Endoscopy Products with Premier, Inc. This agreement, starting on February 1st, 2025, enables Premier members to potentially benefit from the deal.

news.headline: Walmart offers last-minute deals, extended shipping deadline of 48 hours, ensuring convenience for customers.
news.summary: In Bentonville, Arkansas, Walmart has successfully wrapped up yet another successful holiday season. Leveraging its efficient supply chain and numerous store locations, the retail giant has provided exceptional convenience and customer service. As the countdown to the holidays winds down, Walmart is offering new discounts on popular gifts and has extended its shipping deadlines by an additional 48 hours, giving customers more time to shop for deliveries. This strategy aims to cater to customers still looking to complete their holiday shopping.

news.headline: Valcann, part of AWS Partner Network, named Latin America's 'AWS Collaboration Partner of the Year' in 2024.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Valcann, a recognized member of the AWS Partner Network (APN), has been named the 'AWS Collaboration Partner of the Year LATAM' on December 9, 2024. This award highlights Valcann's dedication to creating cutting-edge AWS solutions for its clients in Latin America.

news.headline: Generative AI reshaping world map, US & China lead with top-performing models. BOSTON, Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: In Boston on December 9, 2024, the emergence of generative AI technologies is showcasing the dominance of the US and China. Companies in these leading GenAI nations have surged ahead in developing and extensively deploying high-performing large language models. This trend indicates their significant progress in the rapidly evolving technology sector.

news.headline: Sovereign wealth and public pension funds to transform private markets, along with family offices and endowments.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Boston, it was reported that principal investors, such as sovereign wealth funds, public pension funds, family offices, and endowments, hold significant influence in the investment realm. As expectations evolve and interest rates fluctuate, these investors face the challenge of managing a growing portfolio. Their impact is substantial as they navigate through changing financial landscapes and strive to achieve their investment goals.

news.headline: Japanese Economy Watchers Poll Actual 49.4 (Forecast 47.4, Previous 47.5)
Pepe cryptocurrency surged 27% over the week, outperforming Dogecoin and Shiba Inu, with over $2 billion market valuation.
news.summary: Frog-themed digital currency Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) had a notable surge in the past week, surpassing other meme coins in performance. The Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH)-based coin saw an impressive increase of over 27%, making it the top-performing meme coin with a market cap exceeding $2 billion. This growth outshined well-known tokens like Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB), which only experienced gains of 3.51% and 4.80%, respectively during the same period. This information was reported on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse admits crypto super PAC, Fairshake, formed due to SEC Chair. $204M in response to Gensler.
news.summary: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse recently revealed that the formation of Fairshake, a super PAC dedicated to cryptocurrency, was directly linked to the SEC's regulatory stance under Gary Gensler. In an interview with CBS News on Dec. 8, Garlinghouse emphasized that the crypto industry felt compelled to come together in response to what they perceived as a "war on crypto." He stated that Fairshake's creation was a direct result of the SEC's actions, suggesting that it may not have existed under a different SEC Chair. Garlinghouse's insights on the crypto industry's struggles for regulatory clarity were further detailed in an interview available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Former CEO of Russian crypto exchange WEX arrested in Poland for US extradition after being released in 2021 following a 40-day arrest.
news.summary: In 2021, a former cryptocurrency executive was previously detained in Poland for issues related to the case. However, after 40 days, the individual was released from custody.

news.headline: Japan's 2024 Bankruptcy Filings to Exceed 10,000 for First Time since 2013: Tokyo Shoko Research
Study in Journal of Hepatology features HistoIndex, Merck & Co., MSD, and Virginia Commonwealth University, bridging clinical research and care with AI tool.
news.summary: In Singapore, a recent collaborative research study was released in the Journal of Hepatology involving HistoIndex, a prominent provider of stain-free digital pathology solutions focusing on fibrotic diseases, in partnership with Merck & Co., MSD, and Virginia Commonwealth University. The study delves into the impacts of fibrotic diseases and their management, with important contributions from noted institutions and industry leaders.

news.headline: Taiwan's household products industry prioritizes customization, health, and wellbeing - TAITRA leading the way.
news.summary: In Taipei on December 8, 2024, Taiwan's household products sector is prioritizing solutions that cater to various lifestyles and advocate for health and wellness. With an increasing emphasis on mental health and environmental concerns, the Taiwan External Trade Development Council (TAITRA) is leading the way to promote these initiatives.

news.headline: First Prescriptions for Lumeblue® drug issued in China on Dec. 6, 2024, for visualization of colorectal lesions in adult patients.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on December 8, 2024, China Medical System Holdings Limited made an announcement that the first prescriptions for their groundbreaking drug Lumeblue® have been dispensed in China. This marks the official entry into clinical use of the first oral methylthioninium chloride enteric-coated sustained-release tablets in China. Lumeblue® is specifically designed to improve the visibility of colorectal lesions during screening or surveillance colonoscopies for adult patients. This development signifies a significant milestone in the medical field, with the innovative drug now available for practical use in healthcare settings.

news.headline: The argument for avoiding a Roth conversion grows if Trump tax cuts persist, due to potential tax savings.
Bitcoin hits $100K, Dow reaches 45K in 'everything' rally. Don't miss out on the surge.
Delilah, a popular radio personality, explains dislike for spending money on 'everything.'
Costco's earnings report will demonstrate the significance of discounts for consumers.
Stocks and cryptocurrencies may see a boost till the end of the year, but remain cautious of a potential unforeseen risks.
Sequel 'Moana 2' crushes box office, hits $600M worldwide.
The Broadway show, 'Wicked', has raked in a whopping $6 billion, surpassing expectations for its success.
After shooting incident, tens of millions could face unaffordable health insurance.
Juan Soto signs historic $765M, 15-year deal with New York Mets.
US Commerce Dept. plays key role in China policy, restricting exports. Policy likely to continue under Trump admin.
news.summary: The department has tackled the issue with China by limiting critical exports, a strategy that is expected to persist during the Trump administration.

news.headline: Amazon shareholders propose adding Bitcoin to treasury to enhance shareholder value, suggesting keeping 5% in BTC for long-term interest.
news.summary: Shareholders of Amazon.com Inc. are pushing for the company to explore a Bitcoin treasury strategy to boost long-term shareholder value. The National Center for Public Policy Research has suggested that Amazon hold about 5% of its assets in Bitcoin. The think tank believes that Amazon needs to enhance shareholder value by considering alternative investment options. This move follows similar proposals made to other Wall Street firms, indicating a growing trend towards integrating Bitcoin into company treasuries for potential long-term benefits.

news.headline: New Zealand's Reserve Bank engages with finance minister on new financial policy; welcomes updated remit relevant to current and future work program
Chinese MMA fighter Shi Ming gained fame after defeating opponent Feng Xiaocan in UFC, solidifying reputation in November.
news.summary: In November, in the Macao Special Administrative Region, Chinese MMA fighter Shi Ming secured victory over Feng Xiaocan in a UFC tournament. This win has further enhanced Shi Ming's standing in the MMA world, showcasing her skills and determination.

news.headline: WSPN and Fractal partner to broaden WUSD stablecoin on Bitcoin, enhancing utility and reach.
news.summary: On December 8, 2024, a major global digital payments company, WSPN (Worldwide Stablecoin Payment Network), revealed a new partnership with Fractal, a prominent scaling solution for Bitcoin. This partnership aims to enhance the accessibility and functionality of WUSD, the stablecoin offered by WSPN. The collaboration will focus on expanding the usage of WUSD, leveraging Fractal's expertise in scaling technology.

news.headline: Peanut-themed token created by pet owner collapses 2 weeks post-launch. Criticized for monetizing personal tragedy.
news.summary: Following criticisms from Longo, crypto traders launched the popular meme coin Peanut, reportedly monetizing his personal tragedy.

news.headline: Notre-Dame de Paris reopened following restoration, highlighting cultural value and mutual learning. Macron thanked all involved.
news.summary: On December 8, 2024, the renovated Notre-Dame de Paris cathedral was unveiled to the public after a lavish ceremony took place a day earlier. French President Emmanuel Macron conveyed appreciation from the nation to the individuals involved in the restoration process during his address at the event.

news.headline: Abbisko presents promising phase 2 study results of pimicotinib for cGvHD at ASH Annual Meeting. Dec 8, 2024.
news.summary: On December 8, 2024, Abbisko Therapeutics revealed the preliminary findings of its Phase 2 study on pimicotinib (ABSK021) for patients with chronic Graft-versus-Host Disease (cGvHD) that had not improved or progressed. The company, listed as Abbisko Therapeutics (HKEX: 02256), shared these results.

news.headline: FPT and RWE sign a 5-year Master Service Agreement to boost innovation and sustainability in IT/OT convergence and renewable energy.
news.summary: In Essen, Germany, FPT has recently finalized a significant five-year Master Service Agreement (MSA) with RWE. This agreement serves to bolster the enduring partnership between the two entities. The primary goals of this collaboration include driving technological innovation, fostering operational excellence, and facilitating sustainable growth to support RWE's ambitious endeavors in areas such as IT/OT convergence, renewable energy, and data-centric solutions. The signing event, held in Essen, Germany, inaugurated a new phase of intensified cooperation, with FPT set to provide ongoing support to RWE.

news.headline: Aura Minerals announces positive exploration results from high-potential projects in Brazil, including Pé Quente Project and near-mine expansion at Paiol Deposit. Success in advancing exploration portfolio to expand resource and reserve base, positioning for sustained growth.
news.summary: Aura Minerals Inc. (TSX: ORA) (B3: AURA33) (OTCQX: ORAAF) has reported promising exploration and drilling findings from various key projects in Brazil. This includes the Pé Quente Project, situated 34 km away from the X1 Deposit in the Matupá Project; expansion near the Paiol Deposit at the Almas Mine; and Aura Carajás. These developments demonstrate the company’s continuous progress in enhancing its exploration initiatives, underscoring its dedication to augmenting its resource and reserve foundation. These undertakings aim to bolster Aura's growth prospects in the long term.

news.headline: Radiant Capital reveals $50M hack by North Korean posing as ex-contractor in October attack on DeFi platform.
news.summary: Radiant Capital disclosed that a cyber attack amounting to $50 million in October was orchestrated by a threat actor believed to be from North Korea. The actor impersonated an ex-contractor during the attack on the decentralized finance (DeFi) platform.

news.headline: Squirrel Ai's Dr. Joleen Liang forecasts AI-driven education at Harvard China Education Symposium.
news.summary: The 15th Harvard China Education Symposium, held in Shanghai on December 8, 2024, focused on the theme "Humanities and Technology: Embracing the New Wave of Education." The event delved into the changing dynamics of the education field, shaped by the convergence of humanities and technology. This exploration of the sector highlighted the growing impact of this integration on education.

news.headline: Global semiconductor equipment sales to hit $139 billion in 2026, projected record growth from 2024.
news.summary: It is anticipated that there will be sustained growth in the front-end and back-end sectors from 2024 to 2026. According to projections, global sales of semiconductor manufacturing equipment by OEMs are expected to achieve a record high, with figures reaching unprecedented levels.

news.headline: Lead Real Estate Co. is launching ENT TERRACE GINZA PREMIUM in Tokyo, opening on Dec. 16, 2024. (Char: 84)
news.summary: Tokyo-based real estate developer Lead Real Estate Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: LRE) unveiled their latest project, ENT TERRACE GINZA Premium, an extended-stay apartment hotel set to open in Ginza, Tokyo on December 16, 2024. The luxurious accommodation will cater to long-term guests and feature upscale amenities. Lead Real Estate Co., Ltd. specializes in developing high-end residential properties like single-family homes and condos in Tokyo, Kanagawa prefecture, and Sapporo.

news.headline: Donald Trump has no plans to replace Fed Chair Jerome Powell before the upcoming Dec 18 meeting, markets predict a 65% chance of a rate cut.
news.summary: President-elect Donald Trump stated on Sunday that he currently has no immediate intentions of removing Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell following his election victory in November. This marks a significant change in Trump's previous stance towards the central bank leader as a crucial December Fed meeting approaches. Trump made these comments during an interview on NBC’s “Meet the Press with Kristen Welker,” where he vaguely mentioned that Powell "would" resign if instructed to do so. This development is being closely monitored by the markets ahead of the Fed’s upcoming meeting on December 18. According to CME FedWatch data, there is a 65% likelihood of another interest rate reduction being announced during the meeting. The Federal Reserve has already implemented two rate cuts, indicating that further monetary policy decisions are being anticipated. For more details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin reverse after spikes. BTC's first-ever weekly close above $100K. BTC -0.49%, $99,600.82. ETH -1.15%, $3,959.94. DOGE -1.21%, $0.4582. Crypto liquidations top $222M in 24 hrs. Bitcoin's Open Interest up 0.26%. Bearish sentiment noted in market.
news.summary: The leading cryptocurrencies experienced a decline in overnight trading following Bitcoin's first-ever weekly close above $100,000. Bitcoin fell by 0.49% to $99,600.82, Ethereum dropped 1.15% to $3,959.94, and Dogecoin saw a 1.21% decrease to $0.4582. Bitcoin briefly reached over $101,000 before dropping below $100,000, while Ethereum hit $4,000 before retreating to around $3,900. Both Bitcoin and Ethereum saw a decrease in market dominance, with Bitcoin's share dropping by 4.45% in the last 24 hours. Cryptocurrency liquidations surpassed $222 million, wiping out $149 million in leveraged long bets. Bitcoin's Open Interest rose by 0.26%, potentially signaling more short positions being added, which is often viewed as bearish. The number of traders betting against Bitcoin increased as the Long/Short Ratio declined.

Chinese CPI MoM Actual -0.6% (Forecast -0.2%, Previous -0.3%)
Chinese PPI YoY Actual -2.5% (Forecast -2.8%, Previous -2.9%)
Chinese CPI YoY Actual 0.2% (Forecast 0.4%, Previous 0.3%)
China central bank injects 474 billion yuan via 7-day reverse repos at 1.50%: statement
Brooklyn DA closes 40 NFT scam sites following artist's $135K loss, uncovering a network of fraud.
news.summary: An examination of a victim of an NFT scam by the Brooklyn District Attorney’s Virtual Currency Unit uncovered a network of counterfeit NFT marketplace sites. The investigation revealed the existence of multiple fraudulent platforms, with a total of approximately 25 fake sites identified and dismantled.

news.headline: Rangebank Battery Energy Storage System in Australia opened with capacity to power 80,000 homes in Victoria for an hour.
news.summary: The newly introduced Rangebank storage system is set to enhance grid stability by providing sufficient storage capacity to supply energy for up to 80,000 households in Victoria for one hour during peak times. This initiative aims to bolster the resilience of the power grid and ensure reliable electricity supply during periods of high demand.
